steps.title: Connect data to the shortcoming
steps.content: The shortcoming was a narrow focus on North America and Western Europe because data from other regions was limited. New banking records from Asia and Eastern Europe would help researchers reduce that limitation.

steps.title: Reject illogical actions
steps.content: Choice B means assume in advance, which does not follow from gaining new records. Choice C means confirm or endorse, but the new data addresses the shortcoming. Choice D means sort into groups. The answer is A.
